page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, utilizing the Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core stress-ng CPU performance and single-threaded compression tasks, such as gzip and bzip3, fall into the weak and poor categories respectively. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core metrics, PassMark CPU scores, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks remains average, supporting steady data throughput.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile, this instance offers stable performance for workloads that can leverage multi-threaded processing. It is well-suited for static web serving, database operations, and Redis caching, where it achieves average benchmark ratings. It is less optimal for single-threaded compute-heavy tasks or large-scale language model inference. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance provides a balanced resource density for general-purpose enterprise applications without the premium cost of specialized storage or GPU hardware.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.4xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 16 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, with no local storage or GPU acceleration. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmarks show weak single-core performance but average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth capabilities. This resource profile makes the instance suitable for multi-threaded workloads, including static web serving, database operations, and Redis caching, where balanced compute and memory are required without the need for high-speed local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for database operations and web serving.

tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM for multi-threaded general-purpose workloads.
